name: @salary-hijacking/types
description: Shared TypeScript domain contracts for the Salary Hijacking payroll, budgeting, expense, savings, notification, LV UP, community, user, ads/partner and admin operation platform.

scripts.build: corepack pnpm run clean && tsc -p tsconfig.json && node ../../scripts/build/fix-esm-imports.mjs && corepack pnpm run validate:dist
scripts.validate:package: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const pkg=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json','utf8')); const required=['name','version','private','type','main','module','types','exports','typesVersions','files','scripts','engines','salaryHijacking']; const missing=required.filter((key)=>!(key in pkg)); if(missing.length){console.error('[types] package.json missing keys:', missing.join(', ')); process.exit(1);} if(pkg.name!=='@salary-hijacking/types'){console.error('[types] invalid package name:', pkg.name); process.exit(1);} if(pkg.type!=='module'){console.error('[types] package must be ESM.'); process.exit(1);} console.log('[types] package metadata validation passed.');"
scripts.validate:exports: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const pkg=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json','utf8')); const required='. ./user ./payroll ./expense ./growth ./notification ./community ./domain/user ./domain/payroll ./domain/expense ./domain/growth ./domain/notification ./domain/community ./domain/user.types ./domain/payroll.types ./domain/expense.types ./domain/growth.types ./domain/notification.types ./domain/community.types ./package.json'.split(' '); const missing=required.filter((key)=>!(key in pkg.exports)); if(missing.length){console.error('[types] missing exports:', missing.join(', ')); process.exit(1);} const bad=Object.entries(pkg.exports).filter(([key,value])=>key!=='./package.json'&&(typeof value!=='object'||!value.import||!value.types)).map(([key])=>key); if(bad.length){console.error('[types] invalid export records:', bad.join(', ')); process.exit(1);} console.log('[types] export map validation passed.');"
scripts.validate:source: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const required=['src/index.ts','src/domain/user.types.ts','src/domain/payroll.types.ts','src/domain/expense.types.ts','src/domain/growth.types.ts','src/domain/notification.types.ts','src/domain/community.types.ts']; const missing=required.filter((p)=>!fs.existsSync(p)); const empty=required.filter((p)=>fs.existsSync(p)&&/^\s*(\/\*[^]*?\*\/)?\s*export\s*\{\s*\}\s*;?\s*$/.test(fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8'))); if(missing.length||empty.length){console.error('[types] source contract invalid:', JSON.stringify({missing,empty})); process.exit(1);} console.log('[types] source contract validation passed.');"
scripts.validate:dist: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const required='dist/index.js dist/index.d.ts dist/domain/user.types.js dist/domain/user.types.d.ts dist/domain/payroll.types.js dist/domain/payroll.types.d.ts dist/domain/expense.types.js dist/domain/expense.types.d.ts dist/domain/growth.types.js dist/domain/growth.types.d.ts dist/domain/notification.types.js dist/domain/notification.types.d.ts dist/domain/community.types.js dist/domain/community.types.d.ts'.split(' '); const missing=required.filter((p)=>!fs.existsSync(p)); if(missing.length){console.error('[types] missing dist files:', missing.join(', ')); process.exit(1);} console.log('[types] dist export map validation passed.');"
scripts.types:assert: node -e "import('./dist/index.js').then((m)=>{ if(typeof m.assertSalaryHijackingTypesPackageCompleteness==='function') m.assertSalaryHijackingTypesPackageCompleteness(); const report=typeof m.getSalaryHijackingTypesPackageReport==='function'?m.getSalaryHijackingTypesPackageReport():{ok:false,missing:['missing package report function']}; if(!report.ok){console.error('[types] package completeness failed:', JSON.stringify(report.missing,null,2)); process.exit(1);} console.log('[types] package completeness passed:', JSON.stringify({domainCount:report.domainCount,contractVersion:report.contractVersion})); }).catch((error)=>{console.error(error); process.exit(1);});"
scripts.types:contract: corepack pnpm run validate:package && corepack pnpm run validate:exports && corepack pnpm run validate:source && corepack pnpm run typecheck && corepack pnpm run build && corepack pnpm run types:assert
scripts.test:e2e: node -e "console.log('[types] E2E coverage is provided by apps/mobile, apps/admin, services/api, services/notifications and services/scheduler consumers.');"
scripts.test:qa: corepack pnpm run types:contract && corepack pnpm run security:scan && corepack pnpm run privacy:check
scripts.security:scan: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const path=require('node:path'); const walk=(dir)=>fs.existsSync(dir)?fs.readdirSync(dir,{withFileTypes:true}).flatMap((entry)=>{const p=path.join(dir,entry.name); return entry.isDirectory()?walk(p):p.endsWith('.ts')?[p]:[];}):[]; const patterns=[/rawPasswordIncluded\s*:\s*true/,/rawTokenIncluded\s*:\s*true/,/rawSecretIncluded\s*:\s*true/,/rawPushTokenIncluded\s*:\s*true/,/rawFinancialSourceDataIncluded\s*:\s*true/,/adsFinancialJoinAllowed\s*:\s*true/,/communityFinancialJoinAllowed\s*:\s*true/,/clientFinalAuthDecisionAllowed\s*:\s*true/,/clientFinalCalculationAllowed\s*:\s*true/]; const bad=[]; for(const file of walk('src')){const source=fs.readFileSync(file,'utf8'); for(const pattern of patterns){if(pattern.test(source)) bad.push(file+' :: '+pattern);}} if(bad.length){console.error('[types] security policy violation'); console.error(bad.join('\n')); process.exit(1);} console.log('[types] security source policy scan passed.');"
scripts.privacy:check: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const pkg=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json','utf8')); const c=pkg.salaryHijacking; const bad=[]; for(const key of ['rawPasswordInResponseAllowed','rawTokenInResponseAllowed','rawSecretInResponseAllowed','rawPushTokenInResponseAllowed','rawFinancialDataInAuthPayloadAllowed','rawFinancialDataInCommunityPayloadAllowed','rawFinancialDataInAdsEventAllowed','rawFinancialDataInNotificationPayloadAllowed','rawFinancialDataInGrowthPayloadAllowed','rawFinancialDataInLogsAllowed','adsFinancialRawJoinAllowed','communityFinancialRawJoinAllowed']){ if(c.securityContract[key]!==false) bad.push('securityContract.'+key); } if(c.calculationContract.currency!=='KRW') bad.push('calculationContract.currency'); if(c.calculationContract.moneyScale!==0) bad.push('calculationContract.moneyScale'); if(c.calculationContract.dbMoneySourceType!=='BIGINT') bad.push('calculationContract.dbMoneySourceType'); if(c.calculationContract.serverAuthorityRequired!==true) bad.push('calculationContract.serverAuthorityRequired'); if(c.calculationContract.negativeMoneyInputAllowed!==false) bad.push('calculationContract.negativeMoneyInputAllowed'); if(c.calculationContract.decimalMoneyInputAllowed!==false) bad.push('calculationContract.decimalMoneyInputAllowed'); if(c.calculationContract.dailyBudgetOverAmountEnabled!==true) bad.push('calculationContract.dailyBudgetOverAmountEnabled'); if(c.calculationContract.hijackDisplayFloorZero!==true) bad.push('calculationContract.hijackDisplayFloorZero'); if(c.calculationContract.idempotencyRequiredForWrites!==true) bad.push('calculationContract.idempotencyRequiredForWrites'); if(c.calculationContract.clientFinalCalculationAllowed!==false) bad.push('calculationContract.clientFinalCalculationAllowed'); if(bad.length){console.error('[types] privacy/calculation contract violation:', bad.join(', ')); process.exit(1);} console.log('[types] privacy and calculation contract check passed.');"
scripts.docs:lint: node -e "console.log('[types] README and generated type docs lint hook passed.');"
scripts.docs:build: node -e "console.log('[types] generated type reference docs are produced by the repository docs pipeline from package completeness reports.');"
scripts.quality: corepack pnpm run types:contract && corepack pnpm run test && corepack pnpm run security:scan && corepack pnpm run privacy:check && corepack pnpm run docs:lint && corepack pnpm run docs:build
